name: Crock Pot Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Chicken Boullion Cube, dissolved in 2 Cups Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Make sure the chicken will fit inside your crock pot.
2. If necessary, trim excess fat and leaves from the chicken.
3. In a slow cooker, add half of the chicken broth.
4. Place the carrots, celery, and onions in the bottom of the crock pot.
5. Put the chicken (back side down) on top of the vegetables.
6. Add the remaining broth, vegetables, salt, pepper, basil, and Italian seasonings (if used).
7. Cover with the lid and cook on LOW for 7-10 hours or HIGH for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 hours.
8. Serve over rice; it makes a large amount and lasts at least 2-3 meals.
